description.zh-Hans: 将输入图像的每个像素映射到调色板中的最近颜色。调色板作为独立的图像输入提供（颜色扫描线）。支持可配置的颜色距离度量和可选的抖动处理。
description.en: Maps each pixel of an input image to the nearest color in a palette. The palette is provided as a separate image input (scanline of colors). Supports configurable color distance metrics and optional dithering.

triggers.zh-Hans: 调色板映射, 调色板替换, 颜色映射, 索引颜色
triggers.en: palette map, palette remap, color map, indexed color

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 将图像颜色映射到指定调色板中最近的颜色。
exampleUsage.en: Map image colors to the nearest colors in a specified palette.
